question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/TopicService.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: findById(EntityId id)] Can an unprivileged external user flood GET /api/v1/topics/{id} with high-frequency requests during a network partition between the REST-Java service and PostgreSQL, causing all HikariCP threads to block indefinitely on topicRepository.findById() and exhausting the connection pool, resulting in a full service denial for all users?
